    getArmPosition() - Method in class org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.subsystems.Intake
    Deprecated.
     
    getBasketAngle(int) - Method in class org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.subsystems.Odometry
    Deprecated.
    Was a Band-Aid fix and doesn't reflect the goals of this class. However, it stays here for future references and learning oportunities.
    getClawPosition() - Method in class org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.subsystems.Intake
    Deprecated.
     
    getCurrentWaypoint() - Method in class org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.util.Path
    Gives an integer value representing the index of the waypoint that the bot is currently targeting.
    getDistanceFromGoal() - Method in class org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.subsystems.Odometry
    Deprecated.
    Was a hard coded version of the newer points of interest. However, it stays here for future references and learning oportunities.
    getDistanceFromPOI(String, DistanceUnit) - Method in class org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.subsystems.Odometry
    Calculates the distance from the center of the robot to the Point of Interest referenced.
    getElevatorPosition() - Method in class org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.subsystems.Elevator
    Deprecated.

    getSuggestedDrive() - Method in class org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.util.Path
    Gives a suggested drive power after considering the distance to the waypoint, drive power, and speed mode
    getSuggestedStrafe() - Method in class org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.util.Path
    Gives a suggested strafe power after considering the distance to the waypoint, drive power, and speed mode
    getSuggestedTurn() - Method in class org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.util.Path
    Gives a suggested turn power after considering the distance to the waypoint, drive power, and speed mode
